identity.name: BMV Books
identity.address: 471 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M5S 1X9, Canada

discovery.text: Verified for Bloor Street West: BMV is the kind of dense, independent, heavily-used frontage that makes the Annex stretch still read as a great street.

narrative.summary: Used-book abundance, long hours, real foot traffic — one of the clearest current Annex edge conditions worth keeping.
